High student or Pro Hero matches your quirk. Answer these questions to find out where you stand in the world of heroes and villains. It is time to discover your true hero identity and go Plus Ultra!
body.title: Which My Hero Academia Hero Are You? Go Beyond Plus Ultra!

topic.display_name: Which My Hero Academia Hero Are You?

characters.name: Yuji Itadori
characters.profile_text:
You are defined by your immense physical strength and an even larger heart, often putting the well-being of strangers above your own safety. Your optimistic nature allows you to find light in the darkest situations, making you a natural beacon of hope for those around you. While you possess a simple, straightforward approach to life, your emotional depth is profound, fueled by a promise to help people so they do not die alone. You are the type of person who makes friends easily and treats everyone with a baseline of respect and warmth.

You thrive in high-pressure environments where your quick reflexes and raw power can make a difference. However, your tendency to carry the weight of the world on your shoulders can lead to intense guilt when things go wrong. You must learn that you cannot save everyone, and that your value is not just measured by your utility to others. Your journey is one of incredible resilience, proving that kindness is a strength rather than a weakness, even in a world filled with darkness.
characters.short_description: A compassionate powerhouse driven by a selfless desire to protect others and ensure they receive a proper death.

characters.name: Megumi Fushiguro
characters.profile_text:
You are a reserved individual who prefers to observe and analyze before taking action, often appearing distant or cold to those who do not know you well. Your moral compass is highly personal; you do not strive to be a hero for everyone, but rather a protector for those you believe deserve a chance at happiness. This selective kindness makes your loyalty incredibly deep and unshakable once it is earned. You value logic and preparation, rarely letting your emotions dictate your first move in a crisis.

In conflicts, you rely on your sharp intellect and versatile skills, always thinking several steps ahead of your opponents. Your greatest pitfall is a tendency toward self-sacrifice, often underestimating your own worth and being too willing to throw your life away for a tactical advantage. Embracing your own potential and allowing yourself to be a bit more selfish could unlock a level of power you have not yet dared to imagine. You are a pillar of stability for your friends, even if you rarely express it in words.
characters.short_description: A stoic and tactical genius who values potential and protects those he deems worthy with quiet intensity.

characters.name: Nobara Kugisaki
characters.profile_text:
You possess an unwavering sense of self and a sharp wit that keeps everyone around you on their toes. You take great pride in being true to yourself, whether that means indulging in high-end shopping or displaying brutal efficiency on the battlefield. You loathe the idea of being put in a box and will fight tooth and nail against anyone who tries to dictate how you should live or act. Your confidence is not just a mask; it is a core part of your identity that allows you to face terrifying odds without flinching.

Your strength lies in your boldness and your ability to remain composed even when the stakes are personal and painful. You have a low tolerance for nonsense and a high standard for those you call friends, though you are fiercely protective of your inner circle. While your confidence is your greatest asset, your stubbornness can sometimes blind you to alternative perspectives or lead you to take unnecessary risks. You live life entirely on your own terms, proving to the world that beauty and power are not mutually exclusive.
characters.short_description: A fierce and confident individualist who refuses to compromise her identity for anyone else's expectations.

characters.name: Satoru Gojo
characters.profile_text:
You are a force of nature, possessing a level of confidence that often borders on arrogance because you truly have the skills to back it up. Your personality is vibrant and often whimsical, as you use humor and a carefree attitude to navigate a world that expects much from you. Beneath that playful mask, however, lies a deeply lonely realization that being at the top means few can truly stand beside you as equals. You are a complex mix of a teacher, a rebel, and a guardian.

You are a visionary who seeks to change the status quo, preferring to mentor the next generation rather than simply enforcing the rules of the old guard. Your primary challenge is the isolation that comes with your unique talents and the difficulty of connecting with those who cannot see the world from your perspective. Despite this, you remain a pillar of strength, always striving to create a future where your students can surpass even your legendary status. You are the ultimate protector, even if you make it look effortless.
characters.short_description: An overwhelmingly powerful and charismatic leader who balances a playful exterior with the heavy burden of being the strongest.

characters.name: Kento Nanami
characters.profile_text:
You are the epitome of professionalism, approaching every task with a structured mindset and a deep-seated hatred for unnecessary overtime. You have experienced the grind of the corporate world and the dangers of the supernatural, leading you to adopt a realistic, somewhat cynical outlook on life. Despite your gruff exterior and insistence on rules, you possess a hidden core of immense kindness and a protective instinct toward those younger than you. You believe in doing what is necessary without the need for grand gestures or praise.

You excel in environments that require precision and reliability, as you are someone who gets the job done without any fuss. Your pitfall is your tendency to suppress your emotions in favor of logic, which can lead to burnout or a sense of detachment from your own desires. You find meaning in the small, quiet moments of life and in the knowledge that your hard work provides a safer world for others to inhabit. You are the adult in the room that everyone relies on, even if you would rather be at home with a good book.
characters.short_description: A disciplined and pragmatic professional who values efficiency, work-life balance, and the protection of youth.

characters.name: Maki Zenin
characters.profile_text:
You are a person of immense willpower, having spent your life defying the expectations of those who sought to hold you back. Born into a world that valued traits you did not possess, you chose to forge your own path through sheer grit and relentless training. You are blunt, honest, and have no patience for traditional hierarchies that prize lineage over actual ability or character. Your drive is fueled by a desire to prove your detractors wrong and to protect those who are treated as outcasts like yourself.

Your combat style is a reflection of your personality: direct, efficient, and devastating. You do not need magic to be a threat because your discipline and mastery of tools make you a formidable opponent for anyone. While your drive to prove yourself is a powerful motivator, it can also make you overly harsh on yourself and others. Learning to acknowledge your own achievements without comparing them to a broken system is your ultimate challenge. You are a self-made legend who refuses to let anyone else define your worth.
characters.short_description: A resilient and determined warrior who has turned rejection into the fuel for her incredible physical prowess.

body.title: Which Jujutsu Kaisen Sorcerer Are You Actually?

topic.display_name: Which Jujutsu Kaisen Sorcerer Are You?

characters.name: Light
characters.profile_text: You possess an exceptional intellect and a polished exterior that often masks a deep-seated ambition. Your life is defined by discipline and a relentless pursuit of excellence, making you a natural leader who commands respect. You thrive on order and have little patience for inefficiency or moral ambiguity, often believing that the end justifies the means when it comes to achieving a greater good. Your confidence is your greatest strength, allowing you to navigate complex social situations with ease while keeping your true intentions hidden behind a charming smile. However, your conviction can sometimes border on arrogance, leading you to underestimate others or become isolated by your own high standards. You may find it difficult to accept criticism, as you view your perspective as the ultimate authority. This internal pressure to remain flawless can be exhausting, yet you continue to push forward, fueled by the belief that you are the only one capable of making the hard choices necessary for progress.
characters.short_description: You are a charismatic perfectionist driven by a rigid sense of justice and an unwavering desire to reshape the world according to your ideals.

characters.name: L
characters.profile_text: You approach the world with a detached, observational curiosity that allows you to see patterns where others see chaos. Your mind is your most powerful tool, and you prefer to spend your time deconstructing problems and testing hypotheses rather than engaging in superficial social rituals. You likely have unique habits or a specific way of working that others might find strange, but these quirks are essential to your creative process and focus. Honesty and logic are your guiding principles, and you have a remarkable ability to remain calm and objective even under intense pressure. While you may appear aloof or socially awkward, your loyalty to the truth is unwavering, and you possess a dry wit that surfaces in unexpected moments. Your main pitfall is a tendency toward social isolation and a potential disregard for your own physical well-being in favor of mental pursuits. You might struggle to connect with others on an emotional level, preferring the clarity of data and evidence over the messiness of human feelings. Despite this, your brilliance and integrity make you an indispensable force for clarity in a confusing world.
characters.short_description: You are an eccentric, highly analytical thinker who values truth above all else, often operating outside conventional social norms to solve complex puzzles.

Will you use your brilliance to reshape the world from the shadows, or will you sacrifice everything to solve the puzzle and uphold the law? This quiz analyzes your logic, ethics, and social habits to determine which genius matches your soul.
body.title: Are You a Mastermind or a Justice Seeker? Light vs. L

topic.display_name: Are You More Like Light or L?

characters.name: Edward Elric
characters.profile_text:
You possess a sharp mind and a stubborn streak that makes you refuse to accept the impossible. Your journey is defined by a past mistake you are determined to rectify, showing a level of resilience that few can match. While you often react explosively to comments about your height or authority, your heart is undeniably in the right place, and you would sacrifice everything to protect those you love. You value action over empty words and are always the first to jump into the fray when you see an injustice.

Your greatest strength is your ingenuity in the face of crisis, but your impulsiveness can sometimes lead you into dangerous situations. You struggle with the weight of your own guilt, yet it is this very burden that pushes you to seek a better path without ever taking the easy way out. You are fiercely independent and often try to carry the world on your shoulders, but you are slowly learning that relying on others isn't a sign of weakness, but a different kind of strength.
characters.short_description: You are a brilliant, hot-headed alchemist driven by a fierce sense of responsibility and an unbreakable bond with your family.

characters.name: Roy Mustang
characters.profile_text:
You are a master of strategy, always thinking several steps ahead to achieve your ultimate goal of changing the world for the better. While others might see you as arrogant or overly focused on your career, those closest to you know that your ambition is fueled by a desire to protect your subordinates and prevent future tragedies. You have a flair for the dramatic and a powerful presence that commands respect in any room, using your wit and charm to navigate complex social and political landscapes.

Your tactical brilliance is your greatest asset, allowing you to manage high-stakes environments with ease. However, your intense focus on your goals can sometimes lead to a ruthless streak, and you must be careful not to let your desire for justice turn into a thirst for vengeance. You value loyalty above all else and expect the same from your inner circle, acting as a protective shield for those under your command while you work tirelessly to reach the top.
characters.short_description: You are a charismatic and ambitious leader who hides a deeply compassionate heart beneath a calculated, cool exterior.

characters.name: Alphonse Elric
characters.profile_text:
Despite facing immense hardship, you have managed to retain a sense of kindness and wonder that inspires everyone you meet. You are often the voice of reason, balancing out more volatile personalities with your calm demeanor and thoughtful approach to conflict. Your physical presence may be imposing, but your true strength lies in your capacity for forgiveness and your unwavering belief in the goodness of humanity. You are a natural peacemaker who prefers dialogue over violence whenever possible.

You excel at mediation and emotional support, making you the glue that holds your social circle together. Your main challenge is the tendency to put others' needs so far above your own that you neglect your own identity or desires. You are incredibly patient, but your quiet resolve is just as powerful as any flashy display of strength. You possess a maturity beyond your years, often acting as the anchor for those who are drifting, and your loyalty to your family is the foundation of your entire world.
characters.short_description: You are a gentle, empathetic soul who provides the moral compass and emotional stability for those around you.

characters.name: Riza Hawkeye
characters.profile_text:
You are defined by your unwavering sense of duty and your ability to remain calm under extreme pressure. You don't need to be the center of attention to be effective; instead, you work from the shadows or the sidelines, ensuring that everything runs smoothly and that those you care about stay safe. Your stoic exterior hides a complex history and a deep well of loyalty that you only share with a trusted few. You are the person everyone relies on when things go wrong because they know you will never flinch.

Your precision and reliability are unmatched, making you an indispensable ally in any endeavor. However, your commitment to your responsibilities can sometimes lead to a rigid lifestyle where you struggle to express your own emotions or vulnerabilities. You believe in accountability and hold yourself to the highest possible standards, even when the world around you is in chaos. You are the ultimate guardian, willing to bear any burden to ensure that the people you believe in can succeed in their mission.
characters.short_description: You are a disciplined, sharp-eyed professional who serves as the steady hand and silent protector of your comrades.

characters.name: Scar
characters.profile_text:
You often find yourself at odds with the world, guided by a personal code that others may find difficult to understand. Your life has been shaped by loss, leading you to seek retribution against those you perceive as oppressors. Beneath your intimidating and solitary exterior lies a person who is deeply reflective and capable of significant growth, provided you can move past the anger that fuels your actions. You are a man of few words, preferring to let your convictions speak through your deeds.

Your strength comes from your intense focus and your refusal to back down from what you believe is right. The danger you face is becoming consumed by your own hatred, which can blind you to the possibility of redemption or cooperation with former enemies. As you navigate your path, you are learning that true justice often requires more than just destruction; it requires the courage to build something new and the humility to admit when your perspective was too narrow. You are a survivor who is slowly finding a new purpose.
characters.short_description: You are a complex individual driven by a profound sense of justice and the heavy burden of a traumatic past.

body.summary: Are you a prodigy with a heart of gold or a stoic leader with a vision for the future? Whether you are driven by the Law of Equivalent Exchange or a deep-seated desire to protect your loved ones, your personality aligns with one of Amestris's finest. Take this quiz to discover if you are a brilliant alchemist, a fierce warrior, or a cunning strategist. It is time to find out what you would sacrifice for the truth!
body.title: Which 'Fullmetal Alchemist: Brotherhood' Character Matches Your Soul?

topic.display_name: Which Fullmetal Alchemist Character Are You?

characters.name: Charlie Morningstar
characters.profile_text: You are a beacon of hope in a world that often feels cynical, driven by an unwavering belief in the inherent goodness of others. Your empathy is your greatest strength, allowing you to see potential where everyone else sees a lost cause. You approach every challenge with boundless energy and a song in your heart, though your idealism can sometimes lead you to overlook the harsh realities of the environment around you. While your kindness is legendary, you struggle with the weight of your lineage and the fear that your dreams might be too big for the world to handle. You are a natural leader who leads with love rather than fear, often putting the needs of your friends and your mission above your own well-being. Your journey is one of proving that change is possible, even in the darkest of places, provided you have the courage to keep trying. You find joy in the smallest victories and possess a resilience that surprises even your harshest critics.
characters.short_description: The eternal optimist and Princess of Hell who believes everyone deserves a second chance at redemption.

characters.name: Vaggie
characters.profile_text: You are the disciplined backbone of your group, possessing a sharp eye for danger and a no-nonsense attitude toward life. Your loyalty is absolute, and you will stop at nothing to protect the people you care about, often acting as the voice of reason when things get chaotic. You value honesty and hard work above all else, and you have little patience for those who waste time or play games. This protective nature stems from a deep-seated desire to create a safe space in an unpredictable world, though it can sometimes manifest as over-cautiousness or a tendency to be overly critical. You find it difficult to let your guard down, fearing that any sign of weakness could be exploited. However, beneath your tough exterior lies a heart of gold and a profound capacity for devotion. You are the one people turn to when they need a plan or a protector, and your strength is the foundation upon which your community is built. Your dedication is your greatest asset, even if you struggle to forgive yourself for past mistakes.
characters.short_description: A fiercely protective and pragmatic realist who serves as the grounded anchor for those she loves.

characters.name: Angel Dust
characters.profile_text: You are the life of the party, known for your quick wit, sharp tongue, and undeniable presence in any room you enter. You thrive on attention and use your theatrical personality to navigate the pressures of your environment, often hiding your true feelings behind a mask of sarcasm and flirtation. While you may appear superficial to those who don't know you well, you possess a deep sensitivity and a longing for genuine connection that you rarely show the world. You are incredibly resilient, having survived numerous hardships by adapting and finding humor in the darkest situations. Your pitfalls often involve self-destructive tendencies or a fear of being truly seen, as you worry that your authentic self might not be as captivating as the persona you've created. Despite this, you are a fiercely loyal friend to the few you trust, and your journey is about finding the strength to be vulnerable and the courage to demand the respect you deserve. You are a complex soul who uses humor as a shield and a bridge.
characters.short_description: A charismatic and flamboyant performer who uses humor and bravado to mask a complex, vulnerable interior.

characters.name: Alastor
characters.profile_text: You are a master of etiquette and presentation, moving through the world with a confidence that borders on the supernatural. You value style, tradition, and the power of a well-timed joke, believing that a smile is the best way to keep your enemies guessing and your allies intrigued. Your intelligence is matched only by your ambition, and you possess a unique ability to manipulate situations to your advantage while maintaining an air of detached amusement. You are drawn to entertainment and the macabre, finding beauty in things that others might find disturbing. While you are undeniably charming, your true motivations remain a mystery to most, and you rarely allow anyone to see what lies beneath your polished exterior. Your strengths lie in your strategic mind and your ability to remain calm under pressure, but your detachment can make it difficult for you to form genuine emotional bonds. You are a force to be reckoned with, a gentleman of chaos who plays the long game with a grin. You enjoy the finer things in life and the thrill of a good deal.
characters.short_description: A sophisticated and enigmatic powerhouse who navigates life with a permanent smile and a penchant for theatrical chaos.

characters.name: Husk
characters.profile_text: You have seen it all and have the scars to prove it, leading you to adopt a stoic and often grumpy outlook on life. You prefer the company of a stiff drink and a deck of cards over the high-energy antics of those around you, valuing peace and quiet above all else. Your experiences have made you an excellent judge of character, and you can spot a lie or a hidden motive from a mile away. While you often complain about being dragged into other people's problems, you have a hidden streak of kindness that you try your best to ignore. You are the person people go to when they need the cold, hard truth, as you have no interest in sugarcoating reality. Your main struggle is a sense of apathy or the feeling that you've lost your spark, but your presence provides a necessary dose of reality to any group. You are far more observant than you let on, and your quiet support is often the most valuable kind of help your friends receive. You are a realist who has learned that sometimes the only way to win is to keep playing.
characters.short_description: A cynical, world-weary gambler who hides a surprisingly perceptive and empathetic soul beneath a gruff exterior.

characters.name: Niffty
characters.profile_text: You are a whirlwind of activity, driven by a relentless need to organize, sanitize, and improve your surroundings. Your energy levels are unmatched, and you approach every task with a manic intensity that can be both impressive and slightly terrifying to those around you. You have a very specific set of interests and can become hyper-focused on them to the exclusion of everything else, whether it's hunting down pests or seeking out the next bad boy to obsess over. Your strengths lie in your efficiency and your absolute fearlessness; you aren't afraid to get your hands dirty or face down threats that would intimidate others. However, your single-mindedness can make it difficult for you to pick up on social cues or understand the bigger picture, as you are often lost in your own world of chores and whimsy. You are a chaotic force, bringing a strange kind of order to the world through your own unique, and often violent, methods. You find joy in the details and have a surprising capacity for loyalty to those who give you a purpose.
characters.short_description: An energetic and obsessive cleaner with a chaotic streak and a singular focus on order and bad boys.

body.title: Which Hazbin Hotel Character Are You?

topic.display_name: Which Hazbin Hotel Demon Are You?

characters.name: Vex'ahlia
characters.profile_text:
You are a master of observation and resource management, often acting as the pragmatic backbone of your group. Your ability to charm your way through a bargain is matched only by your precision with a bow, making you indispensable in both social and combat scenarios. You have a keen eye for value, ensuring that your companions are well-equipped and that no opportunity for profit or advantage goes unnoticed. While you can be guarded about your emotions, your fierce loyalty to your family and friends is the true driving force behind your every action.

Your pitfalls often lie in your difficulty with vulnerability and a tendency to prioritize material security over emotional openness. You might find yourself carrying the weight of the team's logistics, sometimes forgetting to let others share the burden. However, your protective nature and tactical brilliance ensure that those you love are always safe and well-provided for, even in the direst of circumstances. You are the one who ensures the journey is funded and the path is clear, blending a hunter's instinct with a leader's foresight.
characters.short_description: You are the sharp-eyed strategist and negotiator who keeps the team's resources and spirits balanced.

characters.name: Vax'ildan
characters.profile_text:
You are a person of deep intensity and swift action, often finding yourself at the forefront of danger before others even realize it is there. Your role in a team is that of the scout and the silent striker, utilizing your agility and intuition to neutralize threats before they can escalate. You possess a complex emotional landscape, often grappling with themes of fate and sacrifice, which drives you to be the ultimate protector for your inner circle. Your loyalty is absolute, and you are willing to walk into the darkest places to keep your companions in the light.

Your impulsive nature can sometimes lead you into trouble, as you often act on instinct rather than a calculated plan. You may struggle with a sense of melancholy or the heavy weight of destiny, which can make you feel isolated even when surrounded by friends. Despite this, your courage and your ability to adapt to any situation make you a vital asset, providing the lethal edge and the emotional depth your team needs to survive. You are the shadow that guards the dawn, always ready to strike for the sake of your family.
characters.short_description: You are the swift and stealthy protector who navigates the shadows to ensure the safety of those you love.

characters.name: Grog Strongjaw
characters.profile_text:
You are the physical anchor of your group, possessing a strength and resilience that few can match. In any conflict, you are the first to charge in, drawing the attention of enemies and dealing massive damage to protect your more fragile allies. Your approach to life is refreshingly direct; you value honesty, a good fight, and the bonds of friendship above all else. While you may not always be the one to craft a complex plan, your tactical instincts in the heat of combat are unparalleled, and your presence alone provides a sense of security to your team.

Your simplicity is your greatest strength, but it can also be a pitfall when faced with intellectual challenges or subtle social nuances. You might occasionally let your temper or your love for a good brawl get the better of you, leading to unintended consequences. Nevertheless, your heart is as big as your muscles, and your unwavering devotion to your friends makes you the most reliable companion anyone could ask for in a fight. You are the shield that never breaks and the friend who never leaves your side.
characters.short_description: You are the formidable powerhouse and loyal friend who thrives in the heat of battle and the warmth of camaraderie.

characters.name: Keyleth
characters.profile_text:
You are a natural leader who often feels the weight of the world on your shoulders, striving to do what is right even when the path is unclear. Your connection to the natural world gives you incredible versatility, allowing you to control the battlefield and support your allies with the raw power of the elements. You are the moral compass of your group, always advocating for the most compassionate and ethical course of action. Your journey is one of growth, as you learn to trust your own instincts and embrace the authority that has been thrust upon you.

Your greatest struggle is often your own self-doubt and social awkwardness, which can make you hesitate in crucial moments. You may find yourself overthinking the consequences of your power, leading to a paralyzing fear of making the wrong choice. However, your empathy is your greatest asset, allowing you to connect with others on a profound level and inspire them to be their best selves. As you gain confidence, you become an unstoppable force for good, proving that true strength comes from a kind heart and a resilient spirit.
characters.short_description: You are the powerful and empathetic visionary who balances immense elemental responsibility with a quest for self-discovery.

characters.name: Percival de Rolo
characters.profile_text:
You are the intellectual engine of your team, always thinking several steps ahead and crafting the tools necessary for victory. Your background of nobility and tragedy has forged you into a person of immense discipline and a somewhat dark, dry wit. In combat, you prefer to stay at a distance, utilizing your own inventions to dismantle threats with clinical efficiency. You value logic, tradition, and the pursuit of knowledge, often serving as the strategist who turns a chaotic situation into a calculated win.

Your pitfalls often stem from your internal darkness and a tendency toward isolation or vengeance. You may struggle to let others in, fearing that your past or your inner demons might consume them as well. Your high standards for yourself and others can sometimes come across as cold or elitist, making it difficult to build simple, emotional connections. Yet, your brilliance and your hidden capacity for deep affection make you a cornerstone of your group, providing the ingenuity and the resolve needed to face even the most impossible odds. You are the architect of the team's success, building a future out of the fragments of the past.
characters.short_description: You are the brilliant and refined inventor who uses intellect and precision to overcome the shadows of the past.

characters.name: Pike Trickfoot
characters.profile_text:
You are the light in the darkness for your team, providing both the healing touch and the righteous fury needed to keep everyone standing. Your role is that of the ultimate supporter, often putting the needs of others far above your own and serving as the emotional glue that holds the group together. Despite your small stature, you possess a formidable presence on the battlefield, standing your ground against the most terrifying foes to protect those you love. Your faith and your inherent kindness are your guiding stars, allowing you to see the best in people even when they cannot see it in themselves.

Your primary challenge is the immense pressure you put on yourself to be everyone's savior, which can lead to exhaustion or a sense of failure when you cannot fix every problem. You might also struggle with the duality of your nature—the desire to be a peaceful healer versus the necessity of being a fierce warrior. However, your unwavering spirit and your ability to bring hope to the hopeless make you the most beloved member of your team, ensuring that no one ever has to fight alone. You are the beacon that guides your friends home.
characters.short_description: You are the compassionate and fierce guardian who serves as the spiritual heart and protective shield of your companions.

body.summary: Whether you are a tactical mastermind or a chaotic wildcard, every adventuring party needs a specific heart to keep it beating. This quiz analyzes your decision-making style and group dynamics to see which iconic hero from Exandria matches your personality. Discover if you lead with a blade, a spell, or a well-timed joke in the heat of battle.
body.title: Which Critical Role Legend Matches Your Soul?

topic.display_name: Which Critical Role Character Are You?

characters.name: Miyagi-Do
characters.profile_text:
You approach life with a sense of balance and patience, understanding that the best way to win a fight is to avoid one altogether. Your strengths lie in your discipline and your ability to remain calm under pressure, often finding clarity when others are clouded by anger. You value tradition and mentorship, seeking out wisdom that transcends mere physical combat to improve your character and your connection to the world around you. You are likely the person your friends turn to for grounded advice and a steady hand during a crisis.

However, your commitment to pacifism can sometimes be mistaken for passivity, and you may struggle when faced with opponents who refuse to play by the rules of honor. Your tendency to wait for the first move can leave you reactive rather than proactive in high-stakes situations. To truly excel, you must learn that defending yourself sometimes requires a firm stance and that your quiet strength is a powerful tool for justice, not just a shield for your own tranquility. Embracing your inner warrior doesn't mean losing your peace; it means knowing when the peace must be fought for.
characters.short_description: You prioritize inner peace, defensive strategy, and the belief that karate is for protection rather than provocation.

characters.name: Cobra Kai
characters.profile_text:
You are a person of action who believes that the best defense is a powerful offense, living by the creed of striking first and striking hard. Your competitive nature and high energy make you a formidable presence in any arena, as you refuse to let obstacles stand in your way. You possess an unwavering confidence and a drive to be the best, often pushing yourself and those around you to their absolute physical and mental limits to achieve dominance. You thrive on the adrenaline of a challenge and the satisfaction of coming out on top.

This intensity can be a double-edged sword, as your no-mercy attitude may lead you to burn bridges or overlook the value of empathy. You might find yourself prioritizing short-term wins over long-term stability, potentially alienating allies who cannot keep up with your ruthless pace. While your ambition is your greatest asset, your challenge is to ensure that your hunger for power doesn't consume your integrity or leave you isolated at the top of the mountain. Learning to channel your fire without letting it destroy everything in its path is the key to your ultimate success.
characters.short_description: You embrace a philosophy of aggression, strength, and the relentless pursuit of victory at any cost.

characters.name: Eagle Fang Karate
characters.profile_text:
You represent a unique blend of traditional toughness and modern improvisation, often thriving in chaotic environments where others might falter. You do not care much for fancy aesthetics or ancient rituals; instead, you focus on what works in the moment and how to hit your targets with maximum impact. Your resilience is your defining trait, as you have a knack for getting back up no matter how many times life knocks you down, often coming back with a more creative and aggressive strategy. You are the ultimate survivor, capable of making something out of nothing.

While your adaptability is a major strength, your lack of formal structure can sometimes lead to a disorganized approach to complex problems. You might struggle with authority or rigid systems, preferring to blaze your own trail even if it is the more difficult path. Your journey involves finding the middle ground between your wild instincts and the discipline required to master your craft, ensuring that your bite is just as effective as your bark when the stakes are at their highest. By grounding your fierce independence in a bit of focus, you become an unstoppable force that no one sees coming.
characters.short_description: You combine raw power and unconventional tactics with a gritty, underdog spirit that refuses to back down.

Whether you believe in 'No Mercy' or the art of inner peace, your fighting style says everything about your personality. Take this quiz to discover if you're a student of the legendary Miyagi-Do, the fierce Cobra Kai, or the badass Eagle Fang Karate!
body.title: Strike First or Find Balance: Which Cobra Kai Dojo Do You Belong To?

topic.display_name: Which Cobra Kai Dojo Do You Belong To?

characters.name: The Game Master
characters.profile_text: You are the architect of the arena, possessing total control over the environment and the lives within it. Your strength lies in your absolute objectivity and your ability to view human suffering as a grand social experiment or a form of entertainment. You do not participate in the games; you define them, ensuring that the rules are followed with lethal precision while maintaining a cold, enigmatic distance from the participants. Your pitfalls involve a profound sense of disillusionment and a loss of empathy that borders on nihilism. While you hold the ultimate power, you are often isolated by your position, watching the world through a mask or a monitor. You prefer order and tradition over individual survival, valuing the integrity of the system above all else. Your influence is absolute, but it comes at the cost of your own humanity.
characters.short_description: You occupy the highest tier of power, overseeing the mechanics of the game with a detached, philosophical perspective.

characters.name: The Cunning Survivor
characters.profile_text: You possess a sharp intellect and a ruthless streak that allows you to stay several steps ahead of both the guards and your fellow players. Your primary strength is your adaptability; you can switch between being a team player and a lone wolf in an instant, depending on what the situation demands. You are not afraid to exploit the weaknesses of others or form temporary alliances that you intend to break the moment they no longer serve your interests. However, your constant calculation can lead to a lack of genuine trust, making you a target for those you have wronged. Your tendency to overthink every move might cause you to hesitate during moments that require raw instinct. While your survival rate is exceptionally high, you often find yourself alone at the finish line, having sacrificed every moral bridge to get there. You thrive in chaos because you are the one secretly pulling the strings.
characters.short_description: You are a high-tier competitor who relies on strategic manipulation and a keen understanding of human psychology to navigate the games.

characters.name: The Steadfast Ally
characters.profile_text: You are the backbone of any group, providing the emotional and physical support necessary to endure the psychological toll of the games. Your strengths are your unwavering integrity and your ability to inspire trust in others, which often leads to the formation of the most effective teams. You believe that survival is only meaningful if it is achieved without losing one's soul, and you are often willing to risk your own safety to protect those you have deemed your friends. Your greatest pitfall is your vulnerability to betrayal, as your desire to see the best in people can be exploited by more cynical players. In a game designed to eliminate everyone but one, your commitment to the group can become a fatal liability. You may struggle with the impossible choices presented in the later stages, where your loyalty is pitted against your own survival. Despite these risks, your presence often dictates the moral compass of the entire competition.
characters.short_description: You represent a mid-to-high tier of power rooted in collective strength, loyalty, and moral resilience amidst the carnage.

characters.name: The Vulnerable Participant
characters.profile_text: You enter the games with a disadvantage, perhaps due to physical frailty, a lack of resources, or an overly trusting nature. Your experience is defined by a constant state of fear and a reliance on the mercy or protection of others. While you may lack the ruthless edge of the survivors, your strength lies in your raw humanity and your ability to evoke empathy in a place where it is scarce. You are the one the audience roots for, representing the everyman caught in a nightmare. The pitfalls of your position are numerous, as you are frequently viewed as a liability or a "weak link" by more competitive players. You are often the first to be targeted in games requiring physical prowess or during the nightly riots. Your survival depends almost entirely on luck or the benevolence of a stronger ally. While you may not have the power to control the game, your struggle highlights the inherent cruelty of the system more than any other participant.
characters.short_description: You occupy the lower tier of the power hierarchy, often struggling to keep pace with the physical and psychological demands of the arena.

options.text: I analyze the situation from a systemic perspective, prioritizing the preservation of the game's rules and overall structure.
I calculate which individual is the least useful to my personal advancement and manipulate the group to target them.
I refuse to make the choice, seeking an alternative where the group stays intact even at my own risk.
I experience paralysis or panic, hoping someone else takes the lead and protects me from the fallout.

questions.text: When faced with a high-stakes decision that requires sacrificing a group member to ensure the survival of the rest, what is your primary cognitive process?

options.text: As predictable data points in a larger social experiment on human behavior.
As potential assets to be leveraged or threats to be neutralized through strategic deception.
As fellow human beings who are capable of genuine connection and mutual support despite the circumstances.
As intimidating figures who possess more power or capability than I do.

questions.text: How do you typically perceive the motivations and actions of others in a competitive, zero-sum environment?

options.text: Absolute emotional detachment and a focus on administrative order.
Quick-witted adaptability and the ability to exploit loopholes.
Moral conviction and the strength found in collaborative effort.
The hope that a stronger or more capable person will offer guidance.

questions.text: Which attribute do you rely on most when navigating a complex, unfamiliar challenge under extreme pressure?

options.text: The invisible observer who sets the parameters and monitors the outcome from above.
The shadow influencer who operates within the group while maintaining a private agenda.
The reliable team member who fosters unity and protects the vulnerable.
A follower who seeks safety in numbers and avoids drawing unnecessary attention.

questions.text: What is your preferred position within a hierarchy during a crisis?

options.text: I view it as a necessary and inevitable consequence of the system's design.
I move on immediately, focusing entirely on the next tactical requirement for my survival.
I grieve deeply and feel a renewed sense of responsibility toward the remaining survivors.
I feel overwhelmed by the fragility of my own position and the randomness of fate.

questions.text: In the aftermath of a traumatic event, how do you process the loss of those around you?

body.summary: In a world where survival depends on a mix of intellect, physical prowess, and cold-blooded strategy, where do you stand? This quiz evaluates your decision-making under pressure and your willingness to form alliances to determine your rank. Discover if you are a master manipulator destined for the top or a sacrificial lamb in the first round.
body.title: What Is Your Official Squid Game Power Ranking?
